designSource: img/ui/彩果_晴空汽水紧凑版V2_完整补充交付包

policy.icons: SVG only; imported from src and rendered as URL, inline SVG, or CSS mask
policy.color: Migrated line icons normalize stroke to currentColor
policy.backgrounds: Cards, buttons, inputs, borders, dividers, sheets, and state fills are code drawn; no new full-control background slices are migrated

date.note: Existing SVG set matches the supplemental year/month/day picker package

plans.note: Compact V2 plan icons are already imported by plan management and detail views

settingsEffectCalibration.note: Directory groups and themed SVG icons are integrated; gradient AppHeader is owned by the main thread
44dp header, settings persistence, unsaved-leave guard, and exact parameter icons exist; auto-sync and expand-detail switches are not represented in the current domain model
Latest snapshot, real processed/add/result/failure metrics, sync action, and latest report are rendered; separate fetch-match/update-result commands and task history do not exist
Live completed/total progress, percentage, failure count, disabled submit state, and persistence message are rendered; cancellable sync and per-step log history do not exist
Real success/failure totals, error messages, affected match IDs, and retry-failed action are rendered; historical expandable failure jobs do not exist
Markdown/JSON export and JSON plan restore use grouped list rows and real loading feedback; device-size summary, full backup restore, and destructive local-data reset are not implemented

Existing ticket artwork, runtime version, tagline, privacy/source/responsible-play information, and copyright are rendered; update/help/license/feedback routes and final brand artwork are not supplied
